name: Gorgon Gizzick
sd_appearance: Goblin, hunched and wiry, barely 3 feet tall, with large bat-like ears and wide eyes burning like embers, cloaked in tattered robes of the Cult. The grey wrappings, adorned with a makeshift metal-banded staff, are frayed at the edges. A hidden dagger, a glint of steel, peeks from beneath the worn fabric. A single fiery eye stands out against the gloom, a beacon of determination, as he navigates the labyrinthine Undercity, leading his kin with unwavering conviction.
faction_visual: eclectic mix, deliberately no faction marks, one defining personal item
style_note: cult's grey wrappings, makeshift metal-banded staff, fervent expression
